case_title: ONGPIN, CENON vs. LU, XAM PHUC et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF APR-05-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-05-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-05-1996 TO MAY-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONGPIN, CENON AS TO DEFENDANT LU, XAM PHUC DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-15-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: TOTAL OF $150.00 SANCTIONS NOW DUE. AND AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-20-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-06-1996 TO JUN-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
